frontendText: We specialize in building modern frontend solutions with a strong focus on React. We create fast, scalable, and interactive interfaces that deliver excellent user experience and stable performance across all devices. We go beyond visuals, focusing on client-side logic such as application structure, state management, and performance optimization. We also use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to deliver flexible solutions for various needs. When required, we implement projects using WordPress. From landing pages to complex web applications — we build products that look modern, perform reliably, and scale with your business.
backendText: We build reliable and scalable backend systems using Python, with Django and FastAPI as our core technologies. Our focus goes beyond development — we design architectures that support product growth, from the first users to high-load environments. We develop fast and stable APIs, systems with well-structured business logic, secure authentication and access control, as well as integrations with external services and payment systems. Our backend solutions are designed to remain manageable and predictable in production, with scalability, fault tolerance, and long-term support in mind.
uiuxText: We design modern and user-friendly interfaces with a strong focus on user experience and product business goals. We work in Figma, creating well-thought-out user flows, wireframes, and full UI designs. We pay attention to interaction logic, visual consistency, and responsive behavior. From landing pages to complex products — we craft designs that not only look great but also convert users effectively.
aiText: We implement AI solutions that truly work in real products and deliver business value. We build systems of any complexity — from simple assistants to full-scale LLM-based solutions using RAG (working with your data). We develop AI assistants and chatbots, intelligent search across documents and knowledge bases, AI-driven process automation, and text and audio processing. We pay special attention to production aspects such as performance, request cost, and system stability. We integrate AI into websites, services, and CRM systems so it becomes a core part of the product, not just a feature for the sake of it.
mobileText: We develop mobile applications of basic and mid-level complexity using React Native. We build cross-platform solutions for iOS and Android with a single codebase, allowing faster product launches and efficient maintenance. We implement modern UI, intuitive navigation, API integrations, and well-structured application architecture. Our focus is on stability, performance, and scalability, delivering solutions for MVPs, startups, and growing businesses.

1.title: Project Discussion
1.text: We carefully listen to your ideas and requirements to craft the perfect project.

2.title: Design & Prototyping
2.text: We create unique layouts and prototypes to make sure we’re heading in the right direction.

3.title: Development
3.text: We dive into the code to build a functional and visually appealing website.

4.title: Testing & Launch
4.text: We run final checks to ensure everything works flawlessly before launching the project.

5.title: Support & Optimization
5.text: We continue working with you to keep your site up-to-date and performing smoothly.

header.subtitle: We are a Ukrainian web development studio. From unique design to clean code – we deliver full-service websites! Your business deserves a fast start – hit the button and let’s go!

1.question: How long does it take to build a website?
1.answer: Usually from 10 days, depending on the project complexity, scope of features, and whether a design or layout is already prepared.

2.question: Is there any support for the site after its development?”
2.answer: Yes, we continue to support the project after launch, ensuring its stability and дальнейшее развитие. After the initial support phase, ongoing maintenance is available under individual cooperation terms.

3.question: What other services do you offer besides website development?
3.answer: After developing the site, you need to promote it to attract customers, we have partners who will help with this. We also offer editing services, video shooting, and more.

4.question: Do you help with hosting and domain?
4.answer: Yes, we will advise and help you with the choice of hosting and domain. Or, if necessary, we can do everything ourselves

5.question: How can I contact you?
5.answer: You can write to us on Telegram, Instagram or via the website form.

tesla.description: Landing for Tesla with adaptation and smooth animation. The project demonstrates the ability to work with the layout and adapt it for different devices.

appleHeadphones.description: A concept for Apple headphone branding lendings. Clean structure, nice animation and emphasis on visual style.

scrollAnimation.description: A project with scroll animations using GSAP for smooth transitions. This project will demonstrate the use of animations to improve the user experience.

mercedesConcept.description: Concept landing for new Mercedes AVTR.

fairyParallax.description: A magical scrolling experience using 3D parallax with ScrollTrigger and GSAP. Illustrates animation control based on scroll position.

priceCards.description: Responsive price card layouts with clean design and SCSS structure. Demonstrates flexbox usage and component-based SCSS.

crappo.description: Crypto landing page concept with animations and stylish layout. Focus on structured content and modern UI presentation.

rentiz.description: A modern real estate landing with dynamic blocks, smooth animations, and responsive layout using SCSS and Flex/Grid.

beanAndLeaf.description: A coffee shop concept website with a strong visual layout and custom image slider. Fully responsive and animation-ready.

beautyByMariia.description: A real commercial website for a beauty master. Built on WordPress and code, with custom styling and responsive layout. SEO-ready and client-managed.

watches.description: A concept e-commerce website for a luxury watch brand

TAR.description: A full-scale commercial website for a German heat metering company.Built from scratch using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Fully responsive with a modern layout and custom design.Currently in development, but already available for preview.

Kingsman.description: E-commerce concept store of men's suits and accessories. Stylish and elegant landing page, inspired by the aesthetics of Kingsman. Made from scratch on HTML, CSS and JavaScript.

Dobrozem.description: One-page commercial landing for a land company. Clean, fast, and informative website created to support a webinar campaign. Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and Django, fully responsive and client-ready.

Roslyna.description: Development of an e-commerce platform for a phytotherapy brand 'Roslyna Karpat' (Ternopil branch). Built a modern, user-friendly interface with clear navigation, fully responsive layout, and a scalable architecture ready for full order management and product integration.

Fitokarpaty.description: Development of a digital commerce platform for the Fitokarpaty brand — another direction of Roslyna Karpat. This project extends the brand ecosystem with a dedicated structure, fast user experience, responsive design, and an optimized architecture built for stability and future feature expansion.

Vitaminu.description: Development of an e-commerce platform for the Vitaminu brand, focused on selling vitamins and dietary supplements sourced from international suppliers. The project emphasizes user trust, intuitive navigation, and fast product access. Built a fully responsive interface, optimized catalog structure, and prepared the system for scalability and product expansion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to Nova Team. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.desc: When you contact us (via Instagram, Telegram, WhatsApp, email, forms, or Meta Lead Ads), we may collect:
collect.name: Your name
collect.other: Any other details you choose to share

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.one: To respond to your requests and provide services
usage.two: To send project updates and proposals
usage.three: To improve our services and communication

meta.title: Meta Lead Ads Data
meta.text1: If you submit information through Meta Lead Ads, that information is collected under this Privacy Policy. We will use it only for the purposes described here and in any specific offer terms provided in the ad.
meta.text2: We do not target advertising to minors and will not sell or rent your data. Data may only be shared if required by law or necessary to fulfill our agreement with you.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us via:
